testcase.name: test_admin_dashboard

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total_chauffeurs' in {'recent_pointages': [{'action': 'start', 'chauffeur_id': 'chauffeur_taxi001', 'chauffeur_nom': 'Jean Martin', 'id': '30f2d85d-57fa-4b38-8d4c-f4783d00afaf', ...}, {'action': 'start', 'chauffeur_id': '8467e699-5085-4ce7-bb07-b2ef483a894e', 'chauffeur_nom': 'Chauffeur TestDriver4', 'id': '42ccc723-b845-42c9-a620-16bb863a467c', ...}, {'action': 'start', 'chauffeur_id': 'a8482c51-02e1-4d26-8ea4-2f337bda3915', 'chauffeur_nom': 'Chauffeur TestDriver3', 'id': '5f3e06da-6cdd-463d-ba65-41d405b29a46', ...}, {'action': 'start', 'chauffeur_id': '2611936d-afc5-4c27-bb0b-78089ae73726', 'chauffeur_nom': 'Chauffeur TestDriver2', 'id': '55904471-236f-4c2d-a5e4-ec7eeed5a802', ...}, {'action': 'end', 'chauffeur_id': 'chauffeur_taxi001', 'chauffeur_nom': 'Jean Martin', 'id': '76665224-ff7b-4243-9853-8c9a7bc93123', ...}, {'action': 'start', 'chauffeur_id': 'chauffeur_taxi001', 'chauffeur_nom': 'Jean Martin', 'id': '169c44a2-ff44-4ea4-bf93-a15a4a3857a2', ...}, ...], 'stats': {'active_chauffeurs': 44, 'commission_total': 3929.97, 'completed_courses': 7, 'total_chauffeurs': 47, ...}}
